query: amateur snapshot with crooked tilted horizon, accidentally rotated photo, off-kilter handheld shot
message: composition_and_structure / unconventional_framing — anti_aesthetic. Off-kilter, dutch-angle, accidentally rotated handheld snapshots with informal vernacular framing. Includes parties, sports wipeouts, fallen signs, casual portraiture, awkward angles.

response.objective_caption: A snowman wearing a red scarf stands on a grassy lawn scattered with patches of melting snow. Behind the lawn, a wet paved road curves between single-story suburban houses with lightly snow-dusted roofs, including a pale yellow house on the left and a gray ranch-style home with a white garage door and small front porch on the right. A line of trees and low hills sits on the horizon beneath an overcast sky. The grass shows a mix of green and residual white snow, particularly around the base of the snowman.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A snowman wearing a red scarf stands on a grassy lawn with scattered patches of melting snow in front of a wet suburban street and single-story houses. A large blurry finger obscures the left edge of the frame, blocking part of the view, while the casual, offhand framing and unintended obstruction give the photograph an amateur snapshot energy.
